scripts.build: APP_ENV=live npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.dev: APP_ENV=emulator npm run build && npm-run-all --parallel emulators watch:backend watch:frontend
scripts.deploy-prod: APP_ENV=live           npm run build -w frontend && firebase --project prod    deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy-prod-all: APP_ENV=live       npm run build -w frontend && firebase --project prod    deploy
scripts.deploy-staging: APP_ENV=staging     npm run build -w frontend && firebase --project staging deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy-staging-all: APP_ENV=staging npm run build -w frontend && firebase --project staging deploy
scripts.deploy-prod-test: APP_ENV=test      npm run build -w frontend && firebase --project prod    hosting:channel:deploy test
